notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-11: OTB paid ~10th monthly by CRA, shifts to prior business day on weekend/holiday conflict (confirmed 2026 shifted dates: Jan 9, May 8, Oct 9).
Verified 2026-27 benefit year amounts: up to $378 (sales tax credit), up to $1,307/$1,488 seniors (energy & property tax credit), $189-$290 (Northern Ontario energy credit).
Verified lump-sum rule: annual entitlement <= $500 paid as one lump sum in July instead of monthly.
No existing Arabic content found for this topic — zero-competition opportunity, especially relevant since Ontario hosts Canada's largest Arab community.
Single-country event (_countryCode: ca), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
